choices: 'If you can meet with triumph and disaster…'

questions.q: The longest match in Wimbledon (and tennis) history was an 11-hour, 5-minute marathon between which two players?
What color do tennis balls turn at Wimbledon during play, before laundering changes their hue?
Which All England Club tradition involves Royal box-watching VIPs being addressed by their titles?
choices: Bowing to royals on Centre Court (until 2003)
